title: Agent Registration
description: Sent once when an agent connects to a session. Establishes identity, subscriptions, claimed scopes, and backend capabilities for routing decisions.

subscribes.description: Topic patterns this agent wants signals about. Glob syntax (e.g., 'auth.*', 'db.users.**'). Used by L1 router.

scopes_owned.description: Scopes this agent considers itself responsible for. Other agents touching these get routed to this agent for visibility.

tier.description: Determines how mid-stream injection works for this agent.

supports_midstream_inject.description: Whether the adapter can inject signals into a running generation. False for reasoning models during their thinking phase.

supports_partial_preservation.description: Whether partial output is preserved on cancel. Affects routing thresholds.

is_reasoning_model.description: True for o1/o3/Claude-extended-thinking. Signals queue during thinking phases.

prompt_cache_available.description: Whether the backend supports prompt caching. Critical for hosted-tier cost.

avg_overhead_per_signal.description: Multiplier on baseline cost per signal injection. Native ~1.05, Local-API ~1.08, Hosted ~1.10-1.30.

multi_tenant_isolation.description: How the adapter isolates tenants. 'process' = each agent has its own engine instance. 'request_id' = shared engine, validation per call. 'none' = single-tenant only.
